blocks.text: City can draw level with Arsenal tonight — Barça protect a six-point lead
Man City's 2-1 win over Arsenal on Sunday cracked the title race wide open. Three points at Burnley tonight puts City level on 70 — same games played as Arsenal. The race is alive.
♟️ Thu 17:15 — Magnus Carlsen opens Chess.com Open playoffs, Round of 16
🎮 Thu 17:00 — rain & 100 Thieves vs BIG, CCT Global Finals — Portugal
⚽ Fri 21:00 — Real Madrid at Real Betis — La Liga title-race stakes
